channel.title: Li Lu — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED BAC (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added BAC in Q4 2025 · 28.6% of portfolio. Doubling down further on BAC.

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED META (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added META in Q4 2025 · 12.8% of portfolio. Adding to the compounder.

item.title: Li Lu: NEW POSITION CROCS (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) new position CROCS (CROCS INC) in Q4 2025 · 1.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED BAC (+10%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added BAC in Q3 2025 · 27.4% of portfolio. Doubling down on 15-yr BAC.

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED META (+18%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added META in Q3 2025 · 11.8% of portfolio. Compounder add.

item.title: Li Lu: TRIMMED BABA (-12%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) trimmed BABA in Q3 2025 · 9.7% of portfolio. Took some Alibaba profits.

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED BAC (+8%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added BAC in Q2 2025 · 25.1% of portfolio. First of three consecutive BAC adds.

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED META (+10%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added META in Q2 2025 · 10.2% of portfolio. Compounder add.

item.title: Li Lu: NEW POSITION PDD (+100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) new position PDD (PDD HOLDINGS INC) in Q2 2025 · 17.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED BAC (+6%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added BAC in Q1 2025 · 23.2% of portfolio. First of multi-quarter BAC conviction build.

item.title: Li Lu: TRIMMED GOOG (-19%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) trimmed GOOG (ALPHABET INC) in Q1 2025 · 17.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Li Lu: TRIMMED AAPL (-65%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) trimmed AAPL (APPLE INC) in Q1 2025 · 1.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Li Lu: TRIMMED AAPL (-58%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) trimmed AAPL (APPLE INC) in Q3 2024 · 3.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Li Lu: NEW POSITION OXY (+100%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) new position OXY (OCCIDENTAL PETE CORP) in Q2 2024 · 3.6% of portfolio.
